data.title: Global Patient Engagement Solutions Market set to grow at CAGR of 21.25%, reaching USD 229.5 billion by 2035 due to rising demand for patient-centric healthcare.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in New York, the Global Patient Engagement Solutions Market is experiencing significant changes due to the global healthcare systems' transition to value-based care, digital-focused services, and patient-centered healthcare environments. The market is witnessing a surge in demand, with numbers indicating a substantial increase in the implementation of patient engagement solutions to enhance healthcare delivery and outcomes.

data.title: Neinor Homes meets FY25 guidance with 2,900 units delivered, strong Total Revenues and Adj. EBITDA. Growth expected.
data.description: During a trading update for the fiscal year 2025, Neinor announced that it has successfully delivered approximately 2,900 units. The company reported that its Total Revenues and Adjusted EBITDA have performed at the upper end of the predicted range provided by the company's guidance.

data.title: CHC Navigation releases Apache 6 USV for marine surveying, equipped with NORBIT™ echosounders. Built for high-resolution mapping in aquatic conditions.
data.description: On January 20, 2026 in Shanghai, CHC Navigation (CHCNAV), a leading worldwide supplier of geospatial technologies, unveiled the Apache 6 – 2026 Edition, a sophisticated Unmanned Surface Vessel (USV) tailored for precise bathymetric and 3D mapping tasks. Specifically engineered to support NORBIT™ multibeam echosounders, the Apache 6 offers a complete package for underwater mapping, object localization, and aid in offshore construction operations across diverse water environments.

data.title: Nuclear Diamond Batteries, Inc. reserves Nasdaq symbol "NDBI" for planned uplisting, subject to approvals.
data.description: Nuclear Diamond Batteries, Inc. announced the reservation of the ticker symbol NDBI by Nasdaq in preparation for its planned application to list common stock on the NASDAQ Stock Market. The Company is working on submitting an application to FINRA for approval of the NDBI trading symbol. The uplisting process is subject to Nasdaq listing standards, regulatory reviews, and approvals. President David Tobias stated that the reservation of NDBI symbol is a positive step towards the potential Nasdaq listing, with focus on meeting all requirements for long-term growth strategy. The company will provide updates as progress is made. The article does not provide specific numbers but mentions key points related to the uplisting process of Nuclear Diamond Batteries, Inc.

data.title: Goliath's drilling at Surebet discovers high-grade gold, expanding mineralization in 5 zones. 110 holes from 2025 await assay results.
data.description: Surebet currently has 110 holes from the year 2025 awaiting assays to determine gold equivalent results.

data.title: Earnings report details for multiple companies on January 20, 2026: Revenue range from $61.91M to $7.32B, with projected earnings per share.
data.description: Several companies are set to report their earnings before the bell today:- Peoples Bancorp (NASDAQ: PEBO) is expected to report quarterly earnings of $0.88 per share with revenue around $118.02 million.- SunPower (NASDAQ: SPWR) is likely to announce a quarterly loss of $0.15 per share on revenue of $86.12 million.- Mercantile Bank (NASDAQ: MBWM) is estimated to reveal quarterly earnings of $1.37 per share with revenue of about $61.91 million.- Fastenal (NASDAQ: FAST) is projected to report earnings of $0.26 per share on revenue totaling $2.05 billion.- 3M (NYSE: MMM) is anticipated to share quarterly earnings of $1.81 per share with revenue reaching $6.04 billion.- D.R. Horton (NYSE: DHI) is expected to disclose quarterly earnings of $1.93 per share on revenue of $6.67 billion.- U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) is projected to report earnings of $1.19 per share on revenue of $7.32 billion.- KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) is estimated to report earnings of $0.38 per share on revenue of $1.96 billion.

data.title: Benefit Street Partners L.L.C. purchases $391 million loan portfolio secured by 8 multifamily properties. Allocates loans to commercial real estate platform, including Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc.
data.description: Benefit Street Partners L.L.C. has recently acquired a loan portfolio worth around $391 million. The portfolio is secured by eight modern multifamily properties in various U.S. markets. These properties are sponsored by top-tier borrowers and operators. Benefit Street Partners L.L.C. has divided the loans among its commercial real estate platform, with a portion allocated to Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT). This significant transaction showcases one of the largest acquisitions made by the company in recent times.

data.title: Modiv Industrial increases dividend and provides strategic update. CEO announces higher monthly cash distribution for Class C common stock.
data.description: In Denver, Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), the sole public REIT dedicated to acquiring industrial manufacturing real estate properties, made significant announcements regarding its operations. CEO Aaron Halfacre revealed an upsurge in the monthly cash distribution for the Company's Class C common stock. This move indicates a positive direction for Modiv Industrial's financial strategy.
